feed.title: DeFiBreacher
feed.subtitle: Audit Smart Contract. A minimal, responsive and feature-rich Jekyll theme for technical writing.

entry.title: Let's Crack Gym
entry.summary: Five days a week, no excuses, no skipped sessions. This is my current split. Before we get into it: the weight you use is completely on you. Don’t feel bad if you lift less than the guy next to you or your friend. Everyone starts somewhere. Everyone has different genetics, different history, different goals. The only person you’re competing with is who you were yesterday. Pick a weight th...

entry.title: Debug Your Body: A Fitness Guide for Tech People

link.title: Debug Your Body: A Fitness Guide for Tech People

entry.summary: You can write great codebase, audit smart contracts, and takedown systems at 2AM but when was the last time you debugged your own body? Most tech people treat their health like a legacy codebase: ignore it until it breaks. By then, the damage is already done. And no, coffee cant fix that damage. This is your guide to fixing that. 1. The Sitting Problem The average tech person sits for 10–...
